ab: Haiza inaak tatini u’uskunan tupa’un tu Tiang, lusbut naipa panpupungul madas ikma’ai’un.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Tiang，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Tiang, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Maaki isnava’an a, simul naipa u’uskunan ispapatas, isqaqaisqais nait patasan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Mus’an mupusan muti’un, tudiip saam mapasimul istaa.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Qaitu, madikla naipa i, lusbut simul ikma’ai’un a nitu masuqais sinimulan.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Kinuzin, ni’in amin saam asa mapasimul istaa ikma’ai’un.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Haiza tu tastudiqanin, muskun saam munhaan bukzavan tantungu.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Ihaan inundadanan, asa Tiang munhaan pattaki’an, qaitu, panpungul naipa madas isqaqaisqais tu haqil.
ch: 路途中，Tiang想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Tiang wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: Masaupa naipa u’uskunan simul isqaqaisqais tu haqil, qaitu, antalam amin saam tu, nii amin minadas.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Tin’iangiang a Tiang tatangis, masuqnuq naipa tupa tu, “Mavia amu tu nitu mapasimul zaku isqaqaisqais tu haqil i!”
ch: Tiang急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Tiang aw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: Tupa ka u’uskunan istaa tu, “Maupa i nii asu ana’anak madas a, musasuu tu, mapasimul saam su’u ikma’ai’un a, nii amin asu masuqais.”
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Maaq tu laqbingin a, matingmut a Tiang munhaan pasnanava’an, suqaisun amin sinimul Tiang tu ikma’ai’un pisia u’uskunan.
ch: 隔天上學，Tiang很早就到學校了，Tiang把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Tiang arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Matukaz’av Tiang masisaupa u’uskunan bazbaz tu, na’anak’in naipa qabasin madas ikma’ai’un. Matumasqing amin naipa u’uskunan tu, mituza qabas mapasimul istaa ikmama’ai’un.
ch: Tiang向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Tiang apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
